name: /space-report --share flag returns an explicit error citing the share=never default rather than silently honoring it
command:
mkdir -p space && printf 'metrics: []
' > space/metrics.yaml && printf 'dimensions: {performance: {enabled: true}}
share: never
' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/space-report.sh" --metrics space/metrics.yaml --config space/config.yaml --share https://example.com 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'share=never' err.txt && grep -q 'change config to share' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
